# i18n MISSING-KEY baseline — generated by tool/audit/check_i18n_usage.dart (TOOLING_AUDIT T-001).
# Keys referenced via 'key'.tr() but absent from the tr-TR master (the launched locale shows
# raw keys for these — a real bug, filed as T-015). A focused translation-fix PR adds the
# Turkish strings + clears these lines. `make i18n-usage` fails if a NEW missing key appears.

checkout.cancel_payment_title
checkout.payment_3ds
checkout.payment_3ds_subtitle
checkout.payment_bank_transfer
checkout.payment_cashback
checkout.payment_coming_soon
